name: x-agent
displayName: X-Agent - Browser Automation for X/Twitter & Social
description: Browser-based trend scraping, AI content generation, and automated social actions across X/TikTok/YouTube/Reddit/HN/Google Trends
author: sheldon010507-collab

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic Claude API key (for content generation)

install: npx clawhub@latest install x-agent && cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/x-agent && pip install -e . && playwright install chromium
